metadata.title: Engine Extension Governance Review Queue
metadata.scope: Review queue for runtime-alignment rows marked system_layer = engine_extension.
notes: These records document catalog-governance intent only.
They do not change runtime behavior, scoring, or student-facing truth.
No engine_extension row should be treated as external canonical truth unless a separate explicit review pass changes the crosswalk.

records.why_it_exists: The supported runtime has a foundational isolated-word meaning lane that expects a literal or close-literal answer before context-shaped translation. The incoming crosswalk package did not provide a clean one-word meaning row for that live WM1-style skill.
records.nearest_existing_skill_notes: The nearest existing neighbor in the current crosswalk is the benchmark context-translation row, but that row is broader and more context-shaped than the live runtime translation lane.
records.review_notes: Needs curriculum review to decide whether this isolated-word meaning lane should become a reviewed internal supplement row or remain an engine-only shim.

records.display_name: Identify the visible prefix on a word
records.why_it_exists: The supported runtime has a visible-prefix identification lane that asks for the prefix form itself before or instead of asking for the prefix meaning. The incoming crosswalk package had prefix-meaning rows, but not a clean form-identification row.
records.nearest_existing_skill_notes: The closest external canonical neighbor is the common-prefix meaning row. That row is semantically adjacent, but it does not explicitly encode a form-identification micro-skill.
records.review_notes: This looks useful as an engine-support shim even if it never becomes a reviewed internal supplement. Human review should decide whether that narrower form-recognition lane deserves formal supplement status.

records.display_name: Translate a short Hebrew phrase as a unit
records.why_it_exists: The supported runtime translates short Hebrew phrases as units inside Pasuk Flow and related question lanes. That is a real skill boundary in the engine, but it was not represented cleanly in the incoming seed packet without borrowing a broader benchmark comprehension row.
records.nearest_existing_skill_notes: The nearest existing neighbor is the benchmark context-translation row, but the runtime phrase_translation lane is narrower and more local than a full comprehension benchmark.
records.review_notes: Needs human review to decide whether short-phrase unit translation should be codified as a reviewed internal supplement distinct from broader benchmark comprehension.
